subject: Regirock, the Rock Peak Pokemon — Hoenn legendary golem composed entirely of rocks and boulders
description: A large rocky golem figure is depicted mid-action against a warm dusty background with scattered rocks and debris. The creature's body is visibly composed of rough grey and brown stone masses, with a boxy torso and thick limb shapes. Seven small dots arranged in a cross or H-pattern are visible on the torso face, a defining visual marker of the Regi-family. Dust and rock fragments swirl around the figure as it appears to be striking or landing. The holofoil finish gives warmth and sheen to the stone surfaces.
foreground: large stone golem with dot-pattern torso, surrounded by rock debris and dust
background: dusty rocky terrain with scattered boulders
